message:
🐛 fix: What's New modal for developer-mode (SHA-based) updates (#8548)

The modal returned null when latestRelease was absent, which is always
the case on developer channel (SHA-based tracking, no GitHub release
object). The green button rendered but clicking it produced an
invisible modal.

Fix: only return null when both !latestRelease and !isOpen. When isOpen
is true, render the modal with fallback copy ('New commits available'
instead of release tag, generic notes instead of release body).

Also adds a rotating tip about issue-to-fix turnaround time.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
